title: Product Owner for E-commerce & Risks Team | SEB, Riga

summary.lv: SEB IT Service organizācijas E-commerce & Risks komandai meklē produkta īpašnieku, kas vadīs produkta backlog un sadarbosies ar 200+ aplikāciju komandām, atbalstot bankas pakalpojumus karšu un maksājumu jomā.
summary.en: SEB's IT Service organization is hiring a Product Owner for the E-commerce & Risks team to manage the product backlog and partner with 200+ application teams across the bank's Cards and Payments business.
